revision.text:
[[ja:荏子田横穴]] {{Infobox ancient site |name = Ekoda Yokoana |image = [[File:Ekoda Ouketsu Cave in 2010.jpg|280px]] |caption = Exterior view of Ekoda Yokoana (September 2010) |location = {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}, {{ill|Yokohama|en|Yokohama|qid=Q38283|lt=Yokohama|1=Yokohama}}, {{ill|Aoba-ku, Yokohama|en|Aoba-ku, Yokohama|qid=Q1203361|lt=Aoba Ward (Yokohama)|1=Aoba-ku, Yokohama}}, Ekoda 1-chome, 7-1, inside Ekoda Asahi Park |coordinates ={{coord|35|34|46.0|N|139|32|39.5|E|region:JP-14_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title|qq=}}; {{Coord|35.579361|N|139.544258|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|alternate_name = Kankan Hole |burial = {{ill|Yokoana tomb|ja|横穴墓|1=Yokoanabo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana tomb|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoanabo|qq=}} |map_size = 1st tomb: Total length 7.23m, chamber length 3.56m
Width 2.87-3.18m, height 2.18m
2nd tomb: Total length 3.67m, chamber length 2.7m, max height 1.1m{{Sfn|Yokohama City Board of Education|1993|pp=27-32|qq=}} |built = 1st tomb: Early 7th century
2nd tomb: Late 7th century |burial = Unknown |burial goods = None |designation1 = Yokohama City-Historic site {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|qid=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan|1=Historic site}}} |designation1 = Prefecture: Aoba Ward No. 28
City: Aoba Ward No. 46 |omitted=JP-14 |map = {{location map|Japan Kanagawa|map_dot_label=Ekoda Yokoana|coordinates=35|coordinates=34|coordinates=46.0|lon_deg=139|lon_min=32|lon_sec=39.5|mark=Yokoana_tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location within Kanagawa Prefecture|qq=}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|35|34|46.0|N|139|32|39.5|E|qq=}}|qq=}} }} '''Ekoda Yokoana''' (荏子田横穴) is a pair of {{ill|Yokoana tombs|lt=Yokoanabos|ja|横穴墓|1=Yokoanabo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoanabo|qq=}} located in {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}, {{ill|Yokohama|en|Yokohama|qid=Q38283|lt=Yokohama|1=Yokohama}}, {{ill|Aoba-ku, Yokohama|en|Aoba-ku, Yokohama|qid=Q1203361|lt=Aoba Ward (Yokohama)|1=Aoba-ku, Yokohama}}, Ekoda 1-chome. The site is Historic site as a {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|qid=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan|1=Historic site}}} by Yokohama City{{Sfn|Yokohama City Board of Education|1993|pp=27-32|qq=}}. It is commonly known as "Kankan Hole." == Overview == [[File:Closeup view of Ekoda Ouketsu Cave in 2010.jpg|thumb|280px|Entrance of the first tomb (September 2010)]] The site is located on the southwestern slope of a valley called "Sendoya," carved into the right bank of the upper reaches of the {{ill|Hayabuchi River|ja|早渕川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayabuchi River|1=Hayabuchi River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11511423}}, a tributary of the {{ill|Tsurumi_River|en|Tsurumi_River|qid=Q7850292|lt=Tsurumi River|1=Tsurumi River}}. It was excavated into the {{ill|Kazusa Group|ja|上総層群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kazusa Group|1=Kazusa Group|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11275136}}, the geological base layer of the region, at an elevation of approximately 45m. The site comprises two tombs, discovered in 1928 (Showa 3) and introduced to academia, with excavation conducted in May 1956 (Showa 31). The first tomb features a chamber carved in the type of a {{ill|Gabled roof|ja|切妻造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gabled roof|1=Kirizuma-style|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q13308575}} house, complete with relief carvings of pillars, ridge beams, and rafters. Such a house-shaped chamber is rare among the many yokoana tombs in the Tsurumi River basin, making it a unique example in Kanagawa Prefecture. Due to its early date in the first half of the 7th century, it is believed to have belonged to a regional elite.{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.yokohama.lg.jp/aoba/shokai/bunkazai/a/bunkazai012.html|title=Ekoda Yokoana|work=Yokohama City Aoba Ward|date=October 22, 2018|accessdate=February 1, 2021|qq=}} The second tomb, located above and to the right of the entrance of the first tomb, is smaller, with a more rounded elliptical type and a dome-like ceiling. It is considered a later construction from the second half of the 7th century. On November 1, 1993 (Heisei 5), the site was Historic site as a {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|qid=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan|1=Historic site}}} by Yokohama City{{Sfn|Yokohama City Board of Education|1993|pp=27-32|qq=}}. Today, the site is preserved within '''Ekoda Asahi Park'''. Due to the risk of ceiling collapse, the tombs are enclosed by fences, preventing internal viewing. == Distribution and Notable Yokoanabo Tombskyo) == * {{ill|Ekoda Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ekoda Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Aoba-ku, Yokohama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoba-ku, Yokohama|qq=}}, {{ill|Yokohama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama|qq=}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}) - Municipal Historic site, 2 tombs * {{ill|Ichigao Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichigao Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Aoba-ku, Yokohama) - Prefectural Historic site, 19 tombs * {{ill|Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|qq=}} (Kamakura-style tomb concentration) ** {{ill|Matsugasaki Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsugasaki Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Kōnan-ku, Yokohama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōnan-ku, Yokohama|qq=}}, Yokohama) - Municipal Historic site, 8 tombs ** {{ill|Shichisekiyama Yokoanabo Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichisekiyama Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Sakae-ku, Yokohama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakae-ku, Yokohama|qq=}}, Yokohama) - Over 100 tombs originally ** {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=}} (Sakae-ku, Yokohama) - 23 tombs ** {{ill|Hikoshigaya Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikoshigaya Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Sakae-ku, Yokohama) - 12 tombs === Tokai Region === * {{ill|Kashiya Yokoanabos|en|Kashiya Yokoanabos|qid=Q22118267|lt=Kashiya Yokoanabos|1=Kashiya Yokoanabos}} ({{ill|Kannami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannami|qq=}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}) - National Historic site, 106 tombs * {{ill|Kitaema Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitaema Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Izunokuni|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izunokuni|qq=}}, Shizuoka) - National Historic site, 101 tombs * {{ill|E-no-ura Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/E-no-ura Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Numazu|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Numazu|qq=}}, Shizuoka) - Prefectural Historic site, 92 tombs === Hokuriku Region === * {{ill|Hōōzan Yokoanabos|en|Hōōzan Yokoanabos|qid=Q18339249|lt=Hōōzan Yokoanabos|1=Hōōzan Cave Tombs}} ({{ill|Kaga, Ishikawa|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga, Ishikawa|qq=}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|en|Ishikawa Prefecture|qid=Q131281|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}) - National Historic site, over 150 tombs === Kinki Region === * {{ill|Takaida Yokoanabos|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaida Yokoanabos|qq=}} ({{ill|Kashiwara, Osaka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kashiwara, Osaka|qq=}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}) - National Historic site, over 200 tombs * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Kashiwara)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfukuji Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Kashiwara, Osaka) - 32 tombs === Chūgoku Region === * {{ill|Jūōmen Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūōmen Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Matsue|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsue|qq=}}, {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|qid=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture|1=Shimane Prefecture}}) - 37 tombs * {{ill|Kitsunedani Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunedani Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Matsue, Shimane) - 16 tombs * {{ill|Kamikonishi Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikonishi Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Izumo, Shimane|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumo, Shimane|qq=}}, Shimane) * {{ill|Takatsuku Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takatsuku Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Chibu, Shimane|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chibu, Shimane|qq=}}, [[:en:Oki District|Oki District]]) === Kyushu Region === * {{ill|Takenami Site|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takenami Site|qq=}} ({{ill|Yukuhashi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukuhashi|qq=}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}) - Over 1,000 tombs * {{ill|Shiroyama Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiroyama Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Fukuchi, Fukuoka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuchi, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka) - National Historic site, over 200 tombs * {{ill|Mizumachi Site|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizumachi Site|qq=}} ({{ill|Nōgata|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōgata|qq=}}, Fukuoka) - Prefectural Historic site, over 40 tombs * {{ill|Kozuki Yokoanabo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozuki Yokoanabo|qq=}} ({{ill|Kurate, Fukuoka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurate, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka) - National Historic site * {{ill|Ishinuki Nagino Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishinuki Nagino Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Tamana|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamana|qq=}}, {{ill|Kumamoto Prefecture|en|Kumamoto Prefecture|qid=Q130308|lt=Kumamoto Prefecture|1=Kumamoto Prefecture}}) - National Historic site * {{ill|Ishinuki Anakanon Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishinuki Anakanon Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Tamana, Kumamoto) - National Historic site * {{ill|Nabeta Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nabeta Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Yamaga, Kumamoto|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamaga, Kumamoto|qq=}}, Kumamoto) - National Historic site, 60 tombs * {{ill|Ōmura Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmura Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Hitoyoshi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hitoyoshi|qq=}}, Kumamoto) - National Historic site, 27 tombs * {{ill|Yokkaichi Yokoanabo Cluster|en|Yokkaichi Yokoanabo Cluster|qid=Q11419962|lt=Yokkaichi Yokoanabo Cluster|1=Yokkaichi Yokoanabo Cluster}} ({{ill|Usa (宇佐)|lt=Usa (宇佐)|lt=Usa|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usa|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōita Prefecture|en|Ōita Prefecture|qid=Q133924|lt=Ōita Prefecture|1=Ōita Prefecture}}) - National Historic site, 161 tombs * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Yokoanabo Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Yokoanabo Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|en|Miyazaki Prefecture|qid=Q130300|lt=Miyazaki Prefecture|1=Miyazaki Prefecture}}) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == {{Reflist|qq=}} == Bibliography == *{{Cite book|author=Yokohama City Board of Education|title=Yokohama City Designated and Registered Historic site Volume 3|chapter=Ekoda Yokoana|publisher=Yokohama City|series=Vol. 3|year=1993|pages=27-32|ncid=BN10222285|ref=harv|qq=}} == See Also == * {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} * {{ill|Yokoana tombs|lt=Yokoanabos|ja|横穴墓|1=Yokoanabo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoanabo|qq=}} * {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11505809}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.yokohama.lg.jp/aoba/shokai/bunkazai/a/bunkazai012.html Ekoda Yokoana - Yokohama City Official Site] {{external media|align=center|width=320px|image1=[http://wwwm.city.yokohama.lg.jp/index.asp?dtp=9 Yokohama City Government designation1 Intypeation System]|qq=}} {{Historic site of Japan|qq=}} {{Japanese-history-stub|qq=}} {{Kofun navbar|qq=}} {{Archaeology|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|荏子田横穴|version=104299954|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:荏子田横穴]] [[ja:青葉区]] [[ja:横浜市]] [[ja:市ヶ尾横穴古墳群]] [[ja:㹨川流域横穴墓群]] [[ja:松ヶ崎横穴墓群]] [[ja:港南区]] [[ja:七石山横穴墓群]] [[ja:栄区]] [[ja:宮ノ前横穴墓群]] [[ja:ひこしヶ谷横穴墓群]] [[ja:柏谷横穴群]] [[ja:函南町]] [[ja:北江間横穴群]] [[ja:伊豆の国市]] [[ja:江浦横穴群]] [[ja:沼津市]] [[ja:法皇山横穴古墳]] [[ja:加賀市]] [[ja:高井田横穴墓群]] [[ja:柏原市]] [[ja:安福寺横穴群]] [[ja:十王免横穴群]] [[ja:松江市]] [[ja:狐谷横穴墓群]] [[ja:上塩冶横穴墓群]] [[ja:出雲市]] [[ja:高津久横穴墓群]] [[ja:知夫村]] [[ja:竹並遺跡]] [[ja:行橋市]] [[ja:城山横穴群]] [[ja:福智町]] [[ja:水町遺跡]] [[ja:直方市]] [[ja:古月横穴]] [[ja:鞍手町]] [[ja:石貫ナギノ横穴群]] [[ja:玉名市]] [[ja:石貫穴観音横穴群]] [[ja:鍋田横穴群]] [[ja:山鹿市]] [[ja:大村横穴群]] [[ja:人吉市]] [[ja:四日市横穴群]] [[ja:宇佐市]] [[ja:滝尾百穴横穴古墳群]] [[ja:大分市]] [[ja:蓮ヶ池横穴群]] [[ja:宮崎市]] [[ja:横穴墓]] {{wikidata link|Q11618317}} [[Category:Corridor-type kofun]] [[Category:History of Aoba-ku, Yokohama]] [[Category:Kofun in Yokohama City]] [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Municipality Designated Historic Sites in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
